svg.text: Telepathy Memory Flow Network (MFN) System Architecture

g.text: Layer 1: Immediate Flow Registry (IFR) - Zig Implementation
Layer 2: Dynamic Similarity Reservoir (DSR) - Rust Implementation
Layer 3: Associative Link Mesh (ALM) - Go Implementation
Layer 4: Context Prediction Engine (CPE) - Rust Implementation
Zero-copy memory-mapped regions with lock-free circular buffers
★ Neural spike dynamics in similarity matching

svg.text: Telepathy MFN System - Patent Technical Documentation - Version 1.0
